titleStmt.title: SII 25.208: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 208. (A.R. No. 208 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South base of the verandah of the first prākāra in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This record furnishes the details of date viz., Regnal year 10+1, Kaṉṉi, ba 6, Monday and Rōhiṇi-nakshatra corresponding to 1256 A.D., September 11.

It refers to an attested document registering the agreement in the sale of land (nila-vilaip-piramāṇa-iśaivu-tīṭṭu) executed by the great sabhai of Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puṟaṅkarambaināḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu to the Ādichaṇḍēśvara-dēvakaṉmis and temple of Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiyār. The land of oru mā arai-araikkāṇikīḻaraiyē-iraṇḍu-mā surveyed in the 38th year of Periyadēvar Tribhuvanadēvar was endowed as tirunāmattukkāṇi to the deity, after purchase, for a price-value of 1200 aṉṟāḍu-naṟkkāśu. It mentions the breach of a channel named Akaḷaṅkappērāṟu and the labour employed for the restoration of the maḍai (sluice) of the Chekkār on the east bank of the channel. The ūr-kaṇakkar viz., Śāttāṉam-uḍaiyāṉ Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷappiriyaṉ and Muḷagoṭṭi Iḷaiya Nārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭaṉ of Irāyūr are mentioned as the members of the assembly. The sale-deed was attested by a number of signatories such as Gōvinda-bhattaṉ and Śīrāma-bhaṭṭaṉ of Kaḷattūr, Tiruvēṇkaḍa-bhaṭṭaṉ of Irāmavalūr, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirācentira coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatin netirāmāṇṭu kaṉṉi nā
yaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu ṣaṣṭhiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rocaṇi nāḷ Irācentira coḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkara
mpai nāṭṭu Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷa kulācaniccaruppeti maṅkalattu kūṭṭapperumakkaḷom capai vilaip piramā
ṇa Icaivutiṭṭu nammuruṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiyār koyil Āti caṇṭecara tevakaṉmi koyil kaṇakkar Uḷḷiṭ
ṭārkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu paḷḷicomaṉ poyaṉukku veṭṭaip peṟṟukku taravile cu Iṟaiyili
yāka Iṭṭa nilamāy Ivaṉ tevaiyānapaṭiyāle Ivaṉai māṟic capaip potuvāka nampaṉ kuṟiccip piḷḷaiyār koyi
li niṉṟum meṟkku ṉokki pokiṟa Oḻukkaikku teṟkkupaṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai piḷḷai coḻakaṅka tevar
kāṇippaṟṟukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai velavan kuḷattukku vaṭakkil pperuvaḻikku vaṭakkum merpāṟk kellaiyuḷ yico
ḻakaṅkar kāṇippaṟṟukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Irācakempirac coḻiyavaraiyarkkāṇippaṟṟu pārkuḷattukku teṟk
kum Ākicaiñca Iṉāṉkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa periyatevar tiripuvaṉa tevaṟku muppatteṭṭāvatu Ūraḷaviṉpaṭi rūpāy In
nilam Araimāvaraikkāṇi muntirikaiyum mummuṭi coḻapperuvaḻikku kiḻakku piḷḷai Irācakempirac coḻiya varai
yar kāṇipaṟṟukku teṟkku taṭikaṉā rūpāy Iṉnilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭu māvum
Āka rūpāy 1mā Iṉnilam Orumāvarai Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭu māvum Iṉnāyaṉāṟkku tirunāmattukkāṇi
yāka vilai kuṭuttu koḷvatāka Emmilicaiñṭu vilaipporuḷ maṉṟāṭu naṟkkācu Ikkācu Āyirattu Irunūṟum muṉṉāḷ
[10]vatu nāḷil Akaḷaṅkapperāṟṟil kiḻkaraiyil cekkār maṭaiyuṭaintu Erikaraiyile pala Iṭattu maṭai viṭukaiyil I
m maṭaiyaṭaikka Āḷkkūlikku kurukulattaraiyaṉ pakkal vāṅkiṉa kācukkum policaikkum kuḷakkaṟuti paṇṇi kaṭavatā
ṉa kācukku vāṅki kuṭukkaiyil Ippaṭiyāl Āvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟikaic cilavaṟa koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇa Icai
vu tiṭṭu kuṭutta Iṉnilattukku Ituve vilaiyāvutākavum Ituve porumāvaṟuti poruñ cilavolaiyāvutākavum Ituval
latu veṟu porumāvaṟuti poruḷc cilavolai kāṭṭak kaṭavatalla vāvutākavum Innilatikku Ivarkaḷ veṇumeṉṟa
pote piramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭukkakkaṭavomākavum kuṭuttiyomākil Innilavilaip piramāṇa Icaivu
peruvutākavum Ippaṭi Icaiñca vilaikkuṟaviṟṟu poruḷ koṇṭu (vilai) vilaippiramāṇa Icai
vutiṭṭu kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiyār koyilāti caṇṭecirateva kaṉmi koyilk kaṇa
kkar Uḷḷiṭṭāṟku Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷa kulācaniccaruppeti maṅkalattu kūṭṭapperumakkaḷom paṇiyuṭaiya Ūr
kkaṇakka cāttāṉamuṭaiyāṉ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷappiriyaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai Irāyūr muḷa koṭṭi Iḷaiya nārāyaṇa
paṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉkaḷattūr kovinta paṭṭaṉeṉ Ivai kaḷattūr cirāmapaṭṭaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku I
vai Irāmavalūr tiruveṇkaṭapaṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi yaṟiventuyya cotipaneṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭiy Ivan I
ḷaiya nampi paṭṭaṉeṉ Ivai Āṇṭa nampi paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiven nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
I Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ Irāyūr muḷakkoṭṭi catā maṇṭaya paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 25.208 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
